title: Tick Control Pelham Gardens | Bronx Tick Extermination $125-$325
metaDescription: Professional tick control in Pelham Gardens, Bronx. Protect your family & pets from tick-borne diseases. EPA-approved treatments. Licensed exterminators. Call now!
intro: Pelham Gardens residents enjoy one of the Bronx's most beautiful residential neighborhoods, but the tree-lined streets and lush yards can also harbor dangerous ticks. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive tick control services throughout Pelham Gardens, protecting families and pets from Lyme disease and other tick-borne illnesses. Our targeted treatments ensure your outdoor spaces remain safe and enjoyable year-round.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over 15 years of experience serving Pelham Gardens homeowners with tailored tick solutions that address the unique landscape of this leafy Bronx neighborhood. Our licensed technicians use EPA-approved products safe for children and pets, with same-day service available and a satisfaction guarantee on every treatment.
localContext: From the beautiful single-family homes near Pelham Parkway to the garden apartments along Williamsbridge Road, Pelham Gardens' abundant greenery and proximity to parks like Bronx Park create ideal tick habitats. Our local expertise allows us to target tick hotspots in yards, gardens, and the wooded areas that make this northeastern Bronx community so desirable.

faqs.question: Why is tick control important in Pelham Gardens?
faqs.answer: Pelham Gardens' mature trees, extensive landscaping, and proximity to Bronx Park create ideal conditions for tick populations. Ticks in this area can carry Lyme disease, Rocky Mountain spotted fever, and other dangerous illnesses. Regular professional tick control protects your family, pets, and allows you to safely enjoy your outdoor spaces throughout the year.

faqs.question: What does your tick control service include?
faqs.answer: Our Pelham Gardens tick control service includes a thorough property inspection, targeted application of EPA-approved tick treatments to high-risk areas like lawn perimeters, shrubs, and wooded edges, plus follow-up treatments as needed. We focus on areas where ticks typically live and wait for hosts, creating a protective barrier around your property.

faqs.question: How often should I schedule tick control treatments in Pelham Gardens?
faqs.answer: We recommend tick control treatments every 4-6 weeks during peak tick season (April through October) in Pelham Gardens. For year-round protection, quarterly treatments are ideal. Our technicians will assess your property's specific risk factors based on landscaping, wildlife activity, and proximity to wooded areas to create a customized treatment schedule.

faqs.question: Is tick treatment safe for my children and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use only EPA-approved tick control products that are safe for families and pets when applied by our licensed professionals. We recommend keeping children and pets inside during application and until treated areas dry (typically 1-2 hours). Once dry, treated areas are completely safe for normal use while remaining effective against ticks.
